title: Board duplication not duplicating automations
excerpt:
Hi all, 
I’ve set up a board with a bunch of automations for moving items between groups and sending emails to customers but when I duplicate that board, none of the automations are being carried across to the copy. Does…

posts.author: maddiecoachbright (Maddie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’ve set up a board with a bunch of automations for moving items between groups and sending emails to customers but when I duplicate that board, none of the automations are being carried across to the copy. Does anyone know why this might be?

Thanks!

posts.author: nader.ezzat (Nader Ezzat)
posts.cookedHtml: Exact same issue here - When i duplicate, automations do not carry over - Also when making a board from a template the Automations are not coming through either

posts.author: scunningham (Sean Cunningham)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue. Everything, including the automations, would duplicate when I would duplicate a board. As of yesterday, none of the automations are duplicating and on about half of my boards the automations spontaneously disappeared. Kinda sucks

posts.author: scunningham (Sean Cunningham)
posts.cookedHtml: Just for reference, the automations are stock dependency automations based off the timeline columns for main and subitems.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @scunningham - all automations and integrations (depending on install type) should be carried over when boards are duplicated or created via template. I would recommend reaching out to monday support: support@monday.com as this sounds like a bug.

Thanks
Mark

posts.author: nader.ezzat (Nader Ezzat)
posts.cookedHtml: So after investigation the reason Dependency automations no longer carry over is because they have been de-commissioned in favor of the new Dependency columns recently launched - So its not an issue, just look up the new guidance in the knowledge base

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: That makes sense. The new dependencies are awesome btw!

posts.author: cmcmurray (Clay McMurray)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just created a template based off a board with a number of automations. This removed the current board from my workspace, and when I added it back using the template, all automations were removed.

Checked trash…restores…automations were still removed.
